claim: Coding tasks are becoming solved problems with modern LLMs, shifting the focus to higher-level system design and product thinking
actionable: When building with modern LLMs, focus your effort on system architecture and product strategy rather than implementation details
source_title: Anthropic's Boris Cherny: Why Coding Is Solved, and What Comes Next

claim: The evolution of AI capabilities means developers need to shift from 'how do I build this' to 'what should I build and why'
actionable: Reframe your development process to start with problem definition and system design, using AI for implementation
source_title: Anthropic's Boris Cherny: Why Coding Is Solved, and What Comes Next
